ns0:entry.ns0:title: [unknown] shuaidaoya/FreeNodes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shuaidaoya/FreeNodes
Language: unknown
因调整需要，项目暂时停更1-2个月，休整完毕后会如期回归，感谢理解与等待。过渡节点订阅已更新至下方链接！！！每4小时自动更新🤖，支持v2ray、clash等各种代理软件，利用SubsCheck-Win-GUI自动从节点池爬取免费节点分享

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: json

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Model-Optimizer
Language: python
A unified library of SOTA model optimization techniques like quantization, pruning, distillation, speculative decoding, etc. It compresses deep learning models for downstream deployment frameworks like TensorRT-LLM, TensorRT, vLLM, etc. to optimize inference speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/allenai/OLMo-core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [objective-c] itenfay/WeChat_tweak
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itenfay/WeChat_tweak
Language: objective-c
iOS版功能最全的微信插件，支持最新版微信，具备自动抢红包，屏蔽消息和群消息，过滤特定的群聊，防止撤回消息，伪定位 (朋友圈和附近的人)，修改微信运动步数和实时取景做聊天页的背景等功能。

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

URL: https://github.com/octelium/octelium
Language: go
A next-gen FOSS self-hosted unified zero trust secure access platform that can operate as a remote access VPN, a ZTNA platform, API/AI/MCP gateway, a PaaS, an ngrok-alternative and a homelab infrastructure.
